steps.t: As you and Khagâmi talked at the camp-fire, you were attacked by a group of bandits. You were able to defend yourself with unexpected help from Faeron…
After defending your encampment with unexpected help from Faeron, the Ranger invited you to his camp atop the nearby hill.
Faeron invited you to his camp atop the nearby hill, and there you found his companion, Rhadrog. You should talk to him.
